AR1.rationale: Routed today's reactive interaction to the daybook Log; correctly declined to write decisions.md (no new commitment), observations.md (not a pattern), or followups.md (loop closes with reply) — notes articulate each routing call against the methodology's bars.

AR2.rationale: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.rationale: Inline daybook reference uses relative `decisions.md` plus the 2026-04-15 anchor language; the path resolves and the cross-reference is faithful to the methodology.

AR4.rationale: Only action is creating today's dated daybook with an explicit "Handoff to be written at end-of-day" placeholder; nothing else mutated, so re-running stays coherent.
